CustomField.formula: IF( Referral_days_with_Insurer__c> 0 , TEXT( FLOOR( Referral_days_with_Insurer__c) ) & " days " & TEXT( FLOOR( MOD( (Referral_days_with_Insurer__c) * 24, 24 ) ) ) & " hours " & TEXT( ROUND( MOD( (Referral_days_with_Insurer__c) * 24 * 60, 60 ), 0 ) ) & " minutes", "" )
CustomField.label: Referral time with Insurers
